description_long: This is a two-story suburban house set within a walled lot, featuring a hip roof and a symmetrical facade. The front of the house is marked by a central entryway with a decorative arch and flanked by two large windows, while a driveway leads to a garage on the left. The property includes a backyard with a swimming pool, a pool house or shed, and a row of mature trees providing privacy along the rear boundary. The landscaping is well-maintained, with grass lawns, paved walkways, and ornamental shrubs at the front. The exterior walls appear to be finished in light-colored stone or stucco, and the roof is dark, likely shingled. The house is surrounded by a low perimeter wall with a gate opening onto the street.
description: A two-story suburban house with a hip roof, central arched entryway, garage, and a backyard pool, set within a walled and landscaped lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with an arched doorway, driveway, garage, and street-facing landscaping.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and the backyard area with a pool and pool house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard, swimming pool, pool house, and a row of trees along the back fence.
description_view_3: Right-side view showing the side yard, pool, and the street entrance with landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Central arched doorway with decorative trim, flanked by large windows, and a paved approach from the driveway.
